name: @workspace/pc-checker
description: PC Compatibility Checker — Native Android Java App

scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('================================================='); console.log('  PC Compatibility Checker - Native Android App'); console.log('================================================='); console.log(''); console.log('This project has been rewritten as a native Android'); console.log('Java application and cannot be previewed in-browser.'); console.log(''); console.log('To build and run on your device:'); console.log('  1. Open this folder in Android Studio'); console.log('  2. Connect an Android device or start an emulator'); console.log('  3. Click Run (Shift+F10)'); console.log(''); console.log('Source files:'); const {execSync} = require('child_process'); try { console.log(execSync('find app/src/main/java -name \"*.java\" | sed s|.*/java/||').toString()); } catch(e) {} console.log('Waiting...'); setInterval(() => {}, 10000);"
